title: Theme: Business and Office
description: Vocabulary for professional settings and meetings.

sentences.spanish: Tenemos una reunión importante a las diez de la mañana.
sentences.english: We have an important meeting at ten in the morning.

sentences.spanish: Por favor, envíame el informe por correo electrónico antes del mediodía.
sentences.english: Please send me the report by email before noon.

sentences.spanish: Estoy revisando el presupuesto para el próximo trimestre.
sentences.english: I am reviewing the budget for the next quarter.

sentences.spanish: Necesitamos contratar a un nuevo asistente para el departamento de ventas.
sentences.english: We need to hire a new assistant for the sales department.

sentences.spanish: La empresa está buscando expandirse al mercado latinoamericano.
sentences.english: The company is looking to expand into the Latin American market.

sentences.spanish: El gerente de proyectos está fuera de la oficina esta semana.
sentences.english: The project manager is out of the office this week.

sentences.spanish: ¿Podemos programar una videollamada para discutir los detalles?
sentences.english: Can we schedule a video call to discuss the details?

sentences.spanish: He adjuntado el contrato firmado a este mensaje.
sentences.english: I have attached the signed contract to this message.

sentences.spanish: Estamos trabajando duro para cumplir con la fecha límite.
sentences.english: We are working hard to meet the deadline.

sentences.spanish: Gracias por su colaboración en este proyecto tan exitoso.
sentences.english: Thank you for your collaboration on this very successful project.
